reviews.review_description:
I played for a little bit and this is just a mobil game. The thing where you can grab robots is only available after you kill them and the trailer makes it
 look cool but its not
i didn't like it that much because you can only get the robots after you kill them and it's more for a mobile game like if you go down other people are probably gonna say that

by all objective measures, this should be a terrible gaMe. I mean this lovingly, but the raid shadow legends-esque menu makes me want to puke. 

However, the Doom formula of run shoot shotgun never gets old. I can easily imagine this becoming a bite sized doom or quake roguelike.

 Biggest complaints:

 the visuals, especially the menus would actually, i am not joking, be better hand drawn in MS paint. In fact, i would actually do so if i were you. Then you will stand out among others. Something uniquely colorful, or uniquely dreary, or just plain weird. 
Please don't be afraid to be weird, as if you stick to the mobile family game aesthetic, this game will become forgettable in a heartbeat. 
this includes the enemies, too.

the movement: i would add some momentum. Play classic doom, its slow yet fast in an absolutely brilliant way. Make the movement itself feel fun.

the level design. Currently a rectangular arena, you can see over every wall. If you give some real rooms, perhaps ending in an arena. I would design some tight turns and some open spaces to let you get some speed.
dodging around some tight corners then bum rushing through a long hallway to an enemy with missiles at the end would be so much fun.

likes: 

the guns. They feel absolutely great. I love the wrist mount design, and the shotgun feels so satisfying and crunchy when you obliterate an enemu up close.

the enemy ai itself. It is simple, but so is the ai in doom and ultrakill, two of the best games of all time. Its fun to weave through the bullets to place a fist-shotgun round straight in their chest.

----

i dont know if this was a first project, or a cash grab, but you have a choice to make, between really making something just brutally fun, or making a cash-grab which will fade into obscurity within a year.

i am going to hope, and wait, and pray you make this game how it was meant to be.
Aaaahhhhhhhh

This is an interesting adaptation of some classic smartphone-style game mechanics to the VR format. I was surprised at how well some of these mindless grindy "numbers go up" features translate to VR. However I mainly downloaded it because the store page promised Mixed Reality features, which the current version does not seem to have.  There's no settings menu as far as I can tell. It's a good foundation for more updates in the future. I'd probably pay $5 or so for a truly completed & expanded version of this game with more weapons, mixed reality, etc. Really liked it though.
Monkey smash
Just good

It’s just free mobile game assests, even the core gameplay sucks, small maps, repetitive enemies, janky guns, janky everything. Do not even download.

reviews.review_title: The game need some major improvements
reviews.review_description: The game is a bit mediocre, but the game did really not too long ago and is very low quality indeed but games like this usually have great potential though the game is built like a mobile game it can work and will work if it gets more improvements
Sigma

reviews.review_title: Needs a LOT of improvement to be good
reviews.review_description: I had high hopes for this game, but when I came in and saw mid music, bad variation in enemy's and the general lack of difficulty, predictable ai patterns, how the game said destroy enemy's by melting the Robots, the lava gun does the same (or less) than the mini gun and shotgun, and has the same death animation  for everyone (except the big robot in the intro but I'll get to that later), the music could've made this game enjoyable atleast but it's the same boring quiet music for the entire game, I could only take 16 levels before I couldn't take it any longer and had to take a stand, now I know this game is in early access but maybe it shouldn't have been sent out before all the problems were fixed or atleast added more then ONE gamemode and ONE character, so in summary this game (when all the problems above are fixed could be a good game but until they are this game is fun for the first few levels but past that, good luck) do not play it until more updates happened, is not worthy of the 4.8 rating do not waste your time, you have been warned.
It was pretty goofy looking but it is really new and kinda looks like those mobile games but it’s alot funner and it’s just overall pretty good
I don’t know if it’s just me or it’s a little bit of a struggle game for me
